front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Chrono Mage — the 1st advancement of the Time Guardian class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: evolved Time Guardian with increased gear decoration density, time crystal embedded in chest, dual clock bracelets on both wrists, time ring projectiles, floating gears replaced by rotating time rings in halo formation. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
